title: SshPackage
description: Ensures an OS package is installed on the target host declared by the referenced Runbook.

packageName.description: Name of the OS package to install (e.g. 'nginx').

runbookId.description: executionId of the SSH::Exec::Runbook that owns this task.

host.description: SSH host — resolved from Runbook via attrHost.

port.description: SSH port — resolved from Runbook via attrPort.

user.description: SSH username — resolved from Runbook via attrUser.

privateKeyPath.description: Private key path — resolved from Runbook via attrPrivateKeyPath.

executionId.description: Unique identifier assigned by the runtime on create.
